data.title: Endúr Awards Share-Based Variable Pay to Top Executives
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Endur ASA ( (DE:4ZT0) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Endúr ASA has granted share-based variable pay for the 2025 financial year to its top executives, reinforcing equity alignment at the leadership level. Chief executive Jeppe Raaholt received 16,092 shares through his company Råbjørn AS, while chief financial officer Einar Olsen was awarded 12,159 shares via Red Devil Holding AS, with both remaining significant shareholders and option holders in the company.

Following these transactions, Raaholt and his related entities hold a sizable equity stake and option package, underscoring management’s long-term commitment to Endúr. Olsen and his close associates similarly maintain a substantial combined holding of shares and options, signaling confidence in the contractor’s strategic trajectory and future value creation for investors.

More about Endur ASA

Endúr ASA is a Scandinavian contractor headquartered in Lysaker and listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange. The company focuses on critical infrastructure projects such as bridges, quays, tunnels and dams, operating a decentralized model that supports local expertise while pursuing serial acquisitions in fragmented niche markets.

data.title: BlackRock Slightly Raises Stake in Siemens Energy to 7.83%
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ).

Siemens Energy has disclosed a change in its shareholder structure following a voting rights notification from U.S.-based asset manager BlackRock, Inc. BlackRock’s total holding in Siemens Energy, including shares and financial instruments, has risen to 7.83% of voting rights as of 7 April 2026, up from 7.77% previously.

The move, reported under German securities law, reflects a modest increase in BlackRock’s stake via both direct equity exposure and derivative instruments. While the announcement is primarily regulatory, the higher position underscores continued institutional investor interest in Siemens Energy and may be read as a vote of confidence in the company’s prospects by one of the world’s largest asset managers.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:ENR) stock is a Buy with a EUR182.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Siemens Energy stock, see the DE:ENR Stock Forecast page.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a Germany-based energy technology company focused on power generation, transmission, and related services for utilities and industrial customers worldwide. Its shares are listed on the regulated market in Frankfurt, with additional trading venues including Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Hannover, Munich, Stuttgart and Tradegate.

data.title: Bilibili Reports No Share Capital Changes in March 2026 Hong Kong Filing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Bilibili ( (BILI) ).

Bilibili Inc. reported to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 10, 2026 that it had filed its required monthly return with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange covering movements in its authorized share capital and issued shares for the month ended March 31, 2026. The filing shows that the company’s authorized and issued share capital across its weighted voting rights Class Y and Class Z shares, as well as undesignated share classes, remained unchanged during March, indicating a stable capital structure and no equity dilution or buyback activity over the period.

By confirming there were no changes to the total number of issued shares or treasury shares for either its non-listed Class Y or Hong Kong-listed Class Z shares, Bilibili signals continuity in its share base and public float. This routine disclosure supports ongoing compliance with dual-listing obligations in Hong Kong and the United States, providing reassurance to shareholders and regulators that there were no capital-raising, conversion or repurchase transactions impacting ownership or voting dynamics in March 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (BILI) stock is a Buy with a $27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bilibili stock, see the BILI Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BILI is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving fundamentals (positive free cash flow, strong revenue growth) and a constructive earnings narrative (engagement and advertising strength with improving margins). This is balanced by still-negative GAAP profitability and a demanding valuation (very high P/E), while technicals are supportive but appear overbought.

data.title: Nevada King Raises C$16.3 Million with Centerra Gold Strategic Investment
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nevada King Gold Corp ( (TSE:NKG) ) has provided an update.

Nevada King Gold Corp. has closed a non-brokered private placement, raising approximately C$16.3 million through the issuance of 77,739,774 common shares at C$0.21 each, including a C$10.4 million strategic investment by Centerra Gold Inc. Centerra now holds 9.9% of Nevada King’s outstanding shares, while chairman Collin Kettell and major shareholder Michael Parker also participated to maintain their pro-rata positions.

The company plans to use the proceeds to advance exploration at its Atlanta Gold Mine Project, focusing on high-priority targets such as Silver Park, Atlanta South, Atlanta North, and Western Rim, as well as for general working capital. Following the financing, Nevada King has over 501.8 million shares outstanding, has granted Centerra participation and information rights under an investor rights agreement, and intends to proceed with a planned 5-for-1 share consolidation, underscoring a move to strengthen its capital structure and strategic partnerships.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NKG) stock is a Hold with a C$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nevada King Gold Corp stock, see the TSE:NKG Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NKG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, continued losses, and cash burn with shrinking equity), partially offset by a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are moderately supportive with the stock above major moving averages, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on NKG stock, click here.

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

The latest announcement is out from PNG Copper Inc ( (TSE:PNGC) ).

Loyalist Exploration Limited has appointed veteran mining executive and Certified Engineering Technologist Bob Bresee as Vice President of Operations, while he continues to serve as a director. With more than 45 years of experience at companies including Kinross Gold, Klondex Mines and Voltage Metals, and deep roots in the Timmins mining camp, Bresee brings extensive underground, permitting and mine-development expertise.

The company highlights Bresee’s prior role as project manager on its flagship Tully Gold Project and positions his promotion as key to advancing Tully toward production under its “Buy Timmins, Mine Timmins” strategy. Management signals that his operational background and familiarity with Loyalist’s assets are expected to support permitting, development and eventual operations across its Timmins-focused gold and nickel-copper portfolio.

Technicals provide some support via strong recent momentum, but overbought indicators raise near-term risk. Valuation remains challenged due to losses (negative P/E) and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PNGC stock, click here.

More about PNG Copper Inc

Loyalist Exploration Limited is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring and developing quality mineral properties in the Timmins, Ontario Mining District. Its current portfolio includes the Tully gold property, the Loveland nickel-copper-gold property, the Gold Rush gold-silver property and the DeSantis gold property, all advancing under its “Buy Timmins, Mine Timmins” strategy.

An announcement from Banca Profilo SPA ( (IT:PRO) ) is now available.

Banca Profilo has announced that its controlling shareholder, Arepo BP S.p.A., has submitted individual proposals for resolutions and voting on the sixth, seventh and eighth items on the agenda of the upcoming Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for 23 and 24 April 2026. The bank has made these shareholder proposals publicly accessible at its Milan registered office, via the 1INFO storage system, and on its corporate website, enhancing transparency ahead of the key governance votes.

The move underscores the active role of the controlling shareholder in shaping Banca Profilo’s corporate decisions and may influence the direction of resolutions to be adopted at the meeting. data.title: Clifford Modern Living Deepens Precious Metal Bets in Major Transaction
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd ( (HK:3686) ) has provided an update.

Clifford Modern Living Holdings has placed an order using internal resources to purchase about 70,600 ounces of allocated silver bullion for roughly HK$42.9 million, marking its third silver investment as part of a broader precious metals strategy involving multiple silver and gold positions executed through a bank. While the third silver purchase alone is classified as a discloseable transaction under Hong Kong listing rules, the aggregation of all recent silver and gold investments crosses the 25% threshold, making it a major transaction that requires reporting, public announcement and shareholder approval, which the company is able to obtain via written consent since no shareholder is deemed to have a material interest or must abstain from voting.

The move underscores the group’s ongoing use of precious metals as a treasury management tool, signaling a more substantial balance sheet exposure to bullion that could affect its risk profile and earnings volatility depending on metal price movements, while also highlighting the regulatory scrutiny and governance procedures tied to large-scale financial investments by Hong Kong–listed firms. For existing shareholders, the announcement clarifies that the enlarged investment portfolio in silver and gold is being executed within listing rule parameters without diluting voting rights or requiring a physical general meeting, potentially streamlining execution but concentrating more corporate resources in non-core financial assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3686) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd stock, see the HK:3686 Stock Forecast page.

More about Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd

Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, which engages in treasury management activities that include investing in precious metals such as allocated silver bullion and both allocated and unallocated gold through banking channels to manage its financial resources and enhance returns.

Average Trading Volume: 879,473

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$751.7M
